steps.title: Use the discrepancy
steps.content: OFT explains cost-benefit trade-offs that vary by species and circumstances. The passage uses lunar intensity to show this: gerbils forage less under higher lunar intensity, while night monkeys forage more because vision matters more to them.

steps.title: State what OFT explains
steps.content: Choice A says species variation weakens OFT, but the passage says it explains the discrepancy. Choice B wrongly says some species do not follow trade-offs. Choice D claims OFT favors benefits over costs, which is not stated. The supported point is that OFT explains different species responding differently to similar conditions. The answer is C.
